characterPresencePlanEn: the protagonist should be clearly readable through face, posture, or fuller-body action while the lived event (adjusting hairclip, discovering eraser dust) stays primary
captureSummaryEn: observational camera relation, close distance, half body coverage, readable face, balanced environment weight
captureGuidanceEn: the frame should feel witnessed from the outside, not automatically self-held
a brief or partial face glimpse is enough; do not force portrait dominance
partial body coverage is enough when it keeps the moment concrete
medium distance is a stable everyday framing for ordinary daily-life moments
balance the protagonist and environment so they support the same lived beat together
the protagonist's face should be readable, but the lived event (hairclip, eraser dust) may still stay primary
close framing is allowed when it helps the lived beat read more clearly
framingZh: 让构图跟随同一个生活瞬间，使动作和空间保持连贯。
framingEn: moment-led framing rooted in the same lived action
mustShowZh: 指尖捏着取下的红色发夹，特写背面的粉色橡皮屑
另一只手轻轻拢着头发的动作
少女的脸部，带着困惑或淡淡察觉的表情
mustShowEn: fingertips holding the removed red hairclip, close-up on the pink eraser dust on its back
the other hand gently gathering hair
the girl's face with a confused or faintly aware expression
mayShowZh: 教室或走廊的普通背景
mustAvoidZh: 将这一刻重写成不同的事件
让无关的路人或背景人物占据比主角更多的视觉权重
mustAvoidEn: rewriting the moment into a different event
letting irrelevant bystanders or background people take more visual weight than the protagonist
atmosphereZh: 一个真实的、在传递中被捕捉的生活切片。
altTextZh: 月见璃音发现发夹背面沾上橡皮屑的瞬间。
